verdicts.note: The entire score hangs on one coded pamphlet phrase ('educate students rather than indoctrinate them'). The dossier shows no stated position on reproductive rights, LGBTQ+ issues, parental rights, or any named curriculum content. Reading a traditional-values stance out of one rhetorical flourish is indirect inference — low confidence, not medium. Direction -1 is plausible but should not enter alignment math.
